category_title: Top-load washing machine with hinged lid
prompt: A residential top-load washing machine with a rectangular cabinet, a rear-hinged lid, and a cylindrical wash basket recessed inside the opening. The lid spans the cabinet top on a horizontal revolute hinge at the back edge, the basket rotates on a vertical continuous joint inside the tub, and a single timer knob rotates on a small revolute joint on the control panel.
label: Top-load washer rear lid single knob

category_title: Top-load washing machine with hinged lid
prompt: A compact apartment top-load washer with a narrow body, a smoked-glass lid, and a tall agitator rising from the center of the wash basket. The lid rotates upward on a rear horizontal revolute hinge, the inner basket spins on a vertical continuous joint within the cabinet, and two control dials rotate on separate revolute joints on the back console.
label: Top-load washer glass lid twin dials

category_title: Top-load washing machine with hinged lid
prompt: A commercial laundromat top-load washer with a deep square cabinet, a thick steel lid, and a large perforated basket set low in the tub. The lid rotates on a full-width rear revolute hinge, the basket spins continuously about the vertical tub axis, and a coin-door flap at the console front rotates on a small side revolute hinge.
label: Top-load washer coin door

category_title: Toilet with hinged seat and lid
prompt: A floor-mounted two-piece toilet with a rounded bowl, a rear tank, and separate seat and lid panels over the rim. The seat rotates on a horizontal revolute hinge axis at the rear of the bowl, the lid rotates on a second coaxial revolute hinge behind the seat, and the flush lever rotates on a short revolute pivot at the tank side.
label: Toilet two-piece side lever

category_title: Toilet with hinged seat and lid
prompt: A compact wall-hung toilet with a concealed cistern, a slim bowl, and a thin rectangular seat-and-lid set. The seat rotates upward on a rear horizontal revolute hinge line, the lid rotates independently on a second rear revolute hinge line, and a flush paddle at the wall plate rotates on a small front-to-back revolute axis.
label: Toilet wall hung flush paddle

category_title: Toilet with hinged seat and lid
prompt: A traditional high-tank toilet with a tall rear cistern, a pull-chain guide bracket, and a wooden seat with a matching lid over the bowl. The seat rotates on a rear horizontal revolute hinge, the lid rotates on its own parallel rear revolute hinge, and the flush handle on the tank body rotates on a short horizontal revolute pivot.
label: Toilet high tank wooden seat

prompt: A countertop tilt-head stand mixer with a heavy pedestal base, a fixed mixing bowl on a front bowl cradle, and a rounded motor head over the bowl. The motor head rotates upward on a rear horizontal revolute hinge at the pedestal top, the beater spindle spins continuously on a vertical axis under the head, and the speed lever rotates on a small side revolute pivot.
label: Stand mixer pedestal bowl cradle

prompt: A retro tilt-head mixer with a wide base, a polished steel bowl locked between two side ears, and a bulbous head carrying a dough hook. The head tilts on a rear revolute hinge above the base, the tool shaft rotates continuously about the vertical mixing axis, and a bowl-lock latch on the cradle rotates on a small revolute pivot at one side ear.
label: Stand mixer retro dough hook

prompt: A compact home baking mixer with a squat base, a smaller bowl, and a streamlined head with a front accessory cap. The head rotates upward on a rear horizontal revolute hinge, the mixer attachment spins on a vertical continuous joint beneath the head, and the front accessory cap flips open on a small revolute hinge at the nose.
label: Stand mixer compact accessory cap

category_title: Printer with hinged scanner lid and output tray
prompt: A home all-in-one printer with a flatbed scanner on top, a front output tray, and a compact rectangular body. The scanner lid rotates upward on a rear horizontal revolute hinge at the flatbed, the output tray folds down on a front horizontal revolute hinge in the body face, and the paper feed roller inside the tray path rotates continuously on its axle.
label: Printer home all in one

category_title: Printer with hinged scanner lid and output tray
prompt: A small office multifunction laser printer with a boxy lower print engine, a broad scanner lid, and a telescoping output support at the front. The scanner lid rotates on a rear revolute hinge above the platen glass, the front output support slides prismatically outward from the output tray, and the tray itself rotates downward on a horizontal revolute hinge in the front panel.
label: Printer office laser telescoping support

category_title: Printer with hinged scanner lid and output tray
prompt: A photo printer with a low body, a narrow scanner lid, and a fold-out front output shelf with side paper guides. The lid rotates upward on a rear horizontal revolute hinge, the output shelf rotates downward on a front revolute hinge, and each side guide slides prismatically along the shelf edge on its own short rail.
label: Printer photo shelf guides

category_title: Hospital overbed table with tilting top
prompt: A hospital overbed table with a C-shaped wheeled base, a single vertical column, and a rectangular tabletop split into a fixed side and a tilting main panel. The main tabletop panel rotates on a longitudinal revolute hinge near the fixed side, the upper column telescopes prismatically inside the lower mast, and each caster wheel spins on its axle while each caster fork swivels on a vertical pivot.
label: Overbed table split top caster base

category_title: Hospital overbed table with tilting top
prompt: A rehab overbed table with a wide H-base on casters, twin uprights carrying a height-adjustable bridge, and a single broad top panel. The tabletop rotates on a transverse revolute hinge along its rear edge, the bridge rises on a vertical prismatic slide within the uprights, and the four caster wheels each spin and swivel on separate supported joints under the base.
label: Overbed table H base broad top

category_title: Hospital overbed table with tilting top
prompt: A compact bedside overbed table with a low rolling base, an offset side column, and a narrow book-style top with a retaining lip at the lower edge. The top rotates on a side-supported revolute hinge at the column head, the inner column slides prismatically for height adjustment, and the small front wheels rotate continuously on their axles beneath swiveling caster stems.
label: Overbed table narrow book top

prompt: A home treadmill with a front motor housing, an upward-folding running deck, and an upright console frame. The running deck rotates on a horizontal revolute hinge at the front base, the front and rear belt rollers spin continuously on transverse axles at each end of the deck, and the transport wheels at the front base rotate on their own axles.
label: Treadmill home folding deck

prompt: A compact walking treadmill with a slim deck, a light front upright, and a small control console above the motor hood. The deck folds upward on a front transverse revolute hinge, the two belt rollers rotate continuously inside the deck frame, and a safety-key latch flap at the console rotates on a small revolute pivot.
label: Treadmill compact walking console

prompt: A fitness-club treadmill with a heavier front frame, a wide running deck, and long side handrails mounted to the console uprights. The deck rotates on a front horizontal revolute hinge beneath the motor cover, the front and rear rollers spin continuously about their transverse axes inside the deck, and a fold-out tablet shelf on the console rotates on a small horizontal revolute hinge.
label: Treadmill club wide deck

prompt: A city stroller with a four-wheel frame, a bucket seat, and a two-bow canopy over the child seat. The front wheels each spin on their axles and swivel on vertical caster pivots, the rear wheels spin on fixed axles, and the canopy bows rotate on paired side revolute hinges at the seat frame so the canopy can fold back.
label: Baby stroller city canopy bows

prompt: A jogging stroller with a tubular frame, one large front wheel, two rear wheels, and a long sun canopy extending from the handle area. The front wheel spins on its axle and steers on a vertical revolute fork pivot, the rear wheels rotate on fixed axles, and the canopy rotates on side revolute hinges where its support arms meet the frame.
label: Baby stroller jogging single front wheel

prompt: A travel stroller with a narrow frame, twin front caster pairs, twin rear wheels, and a short segmented canopy above a sling seat. Each front caster wheel spins on its own axle and each caster yoke swivels on a vertical pivot, the rear wheels spin on their axles, and the canopy segments fold on two side-supported revolute hinge lines above the seat.
label: Baby stroller travel twin casters

prompt: A tracked excavator upper works with a slewing house, a main boom, a stick arm, and a digging bucket at the tip. The upper house rotates continuously on a vertical slew axis above the undercarriage, the boom rotates on a transverse revolute shoulder joint at the house front, the stick rotates on a second transverse revolute joint at the boom tip, and the bucket rotates on a third transverse revolute joint at the stick end.
label: Excavator tracked full arm chain

prompt: A wheeled excavator with a compact slewing platform, an offset boom, a short dipper arm, and a narrow trenching bucket. The upper platform rotates continuously on the vertical centerline above the chassis, the boom pivots on a horizontal revolute joint at the front turret, the dipper pivots on a second horizontal revolute joint at the boom knuckle, and the bucket pivots on its own horizontal revolute joint at the dipper tip.
label: Excavator wheeled trenching bucket

prompt: A mini excavator with a compact house, a short boom, a stubby arm, and a grading bucket with a wide mouth. The house rotates continuously on a vertical slew joint over the lower frame, the boom rotates on a transverse revolute joint at the house nose, the arm rotates on a second transverse revolute joint at the boom elbow, and the bucket rotates on a third transverse revolute joint at the arm end.
label: Excavator mini grading bucket

prompt: A hard-shell carry-on suitcase with a rectangular body, a recessed two-post pull handle, and four corner spinner wheels. The two handle posts slide prismatically upward from the shell on parallel rails, the wheels spin continuously on their axle joints, and each wheel pod swivels on a vertical revolute joint at the shell corners.
label: Suitcase hard shell spinner

prompt: A soft-sided travel suitcase with a deep fabric body on a rigid frame, a telescoping pull handle at the rear, and two larger inset wheels with a front resting foot. The handle stages slide prismatically within the rear frame channels, the two rear wheels spin on their axle joints in the lower corners, and a front document flap rotates on a horizontal revolute hinge near the top edge.
label: Suitcase soft side rear wheels

prompt: A pilot case suitcase with a boxy shell, a telescoping rear handle, and two rollerblade-style wheels under the back edge. The nested handle tubes slide prismatically along the rear corners, the wheels rotate continuously on fixed axle joints at the base, and the top lid opens on a rear horizontal revolute hinge across the case back edge.
label: Suitcase pilot case hinged lid

prompt: A built-in dishwasher with a front control strip, a wide dropdown door, and two wire dish racks inside the tub. The door rotates downward on a horizontal revolute hinge at the lower front edge, the lower rack slides prismatically on side rails near the tub floor, and the upper rack slides prismatically on a second set of rails above it.
label: Dishwasher built in dual racks

prompt: A freestanding dishwasher with a plain front panel, a thick insulated dropdown door, and a silverware basket mounted in the lower rack. The door rotates on a bottom horizontal revolute hinge, the lower rack translates prismatically on wheel-supported side tracks, and the upper rack translates prismatically on its own rail pair under the tub ceiling.
label: Dishwasher freestanding silverware basket

prompt: A slimline dishwasher with a narrow cabinet, a dropdown front door, and a shallow upper tray over a main lower rack. The front door rotates downward on a lower horizontal revolute hinge, the shallow upper tray slides prismatically on short side rails, and the lower rack slides prismatically on longer wheel-guided rails inside the tub.
label: Dishwasher slimline upper tray
